name: Cut Duration
description: Считает суммарную длительность по кадрам в таблице
code: (async function(){var ex=document.getElementById('__cdm__');if(ex){ex.remove();return;}function wait(ms){return new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,ms);});}function detectTheme(){var n=parseInt(v);if(!isNaN(n)&&n>=0&&n<9999){seen[nameVal]=n;}});});}function slide(sc,dir){return new Promise(function(res){var speed=1200;function f(){var edge=sc.scrollHeight-sc.clientHeight;var atEnd=dir>0?sc.scrollTop>=edge-1:sc.scrollTop<=1;sc.scrollTop=dir>0?Math.min(sc.scrollTop+speed,edge):Math.max(sc.scrollTop-speed,0);take();if(atEnd)return sum=vals.reduce(function(a,b){return a+b;},0);var count=vals.length;var theme=detectTheme();var isDark=theme==='dark';var colors={bg:isDark?'#2f2f30':'#fff',card:isDark?'#2a2b30':'#fbfbfd',border:isDark?'rgba(255,255,255,.1)':'#ddd',text:isDark?'#e9e9ec':'#222',muted:isDark?'#b9b9c2':'#999',hint:isDark?'#888':'#bbb',btn:isDark?'#3a3b40':'#f0f0f0',btnText:isDark?'#e9e9ec':'#333'};function showModal(inSec){var val=inSec?(Math.round(sum/60*100)/100):sum;var unit=inSec?'минут':'кадров';var btnLabel=inSec?'В кадры':'В минуты';var m=document.createElement('div');m.id='__cdm__';m.style.cssText='position:fixed;top:80px;right:30px;z-index:99999;background:'+colors.bg+';border:1px solid '+colors.border+';border-radius:10px;padding:18px 20px;min-width:240px;max-width:280px;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,'+(isDark?'0.4':'0.12')+');font-family:sans-serif;color:'+colors.text+';';var hd=document.createElement('div');hd.style.cssText='display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:10px;';var sp=document.createElement('span');sp.style.cssText='font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:'+colors.text+';';sp.textContent='Cut Duration';var cl=document.createElement('button');cl.style.cssText='background:none;border:none;font-size:20px;cursor:pointer;color:'+colors.muted+';padding:0;line-height:1;';cl.textContent='x';cl.addEventListener('click',function(){document.getElementById('__cdm__').remove();});hd.appendChild(sp);hd.appendChild(cl);var fd=document.createElement('div');fd.style.cssText='font-size:11px;color:'+colors.muted+';margin-bottom:2px;';fd.textContent='Значений найдено: '+count;var nd=document.createElement('div');nd.style.cssText='font-size:30px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:2px;color:'+colors.text+';';nd.textContent=val;var lb=document.createElement('div');lb.style.cssText='font-size:11px;color:'+colors.hint+';margin-bottom:14px;';lb.textContent=unit;var bt=document.createElement('div');bt.style.cssText='display:flex;gap:8px;';var cp=document.createElement('button');cp.style.cssText='flex:1;padding:7px 0;border:1px solid '+colors.border+';border-radius:7px;background:'+colors.btn+';cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;color:'+colors.btnText+';';cp.textContent='Копировать';cp.addEventListener('click',function(){var ta=document.createElement('textarea');ta.value=String(val);ta.style.cssText='position:fixed;opacity:0;';document.body.appendChild(ta);ta.focus();ta.select();try{document.execCommand('copy');}catch(e){}document.body.removeChild(ta);cp.textContent='Скопировано!';setTimeout(function(){cp.textContent='Копировать';},1500);});var cv=document.createElement('button');cv.style.cssText='flex:1;padding:7px 0;border:1px solid '+colors.border+';border-radius:7px;background:'+colors.btn+';cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;color:'+colors.btnText+';';cv.textContent=btnLabel;cv.addEventListener('click',function(){document.getElementById('__cdm__').remove();showModal(!inSec);});bt.appendChild(cp);bt.appendChild(cv);m.appendChild(hd);m.appendChild(fd);m.appendChild(nd);m.appendChild(lb);m.appendChild(bt);document.body.appendChild(m);}showModal(false);})()

name: Dashboard
